macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Five Major Tech Firms Report Earnings This Week
items.summary: Heavy hitters among five tech firms that drive the U.S. economy are reporting earnings this week. These companies play a pivotal role in economic performance.

items.title: Fed May Diverge from Other Central Banks on Interest Rates
items.summary: The Federal Reserve may soon diverge from other central banks in its interest rate decisions. This potential split highlights differing monetary policy paths.

items.title: Consumers Continue Spending Despite Low Economic Confidence
items.summary: U.S. consumers are still spending amid low confidence in the economy. This resilience supports ongoing economic activity.

items.title: Median Weekly Earnings Rise 3.4% in Q1 2026
items.summary: Median weekly earnings for full-time U.S. workers reached $1,235 in the first quarter of 2026, up 3.4% from the previous year. This reflects wage growth amid economic data releases.

items.title: Key U.S. Economic Data Released Including Housing Starts and Jobless Claims
items.summary: Recent U.S. data shows Housing Starts MoM at -0.7% and 7.2%, Jobless Claims 4-week Average at 210.75K, and PCE Prices QoQ Adv at 2.9%. Upcoming releases include ADP Employment Change and S&P/Case-Shiller Home Prices.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Poolside AI Launches Laguna XS.2 and M.1 Agentic Coding Models
items.summary: Poolside AI released open-weight Laguna XS.2 (33B/3B-active) and M.1 (225B MoE) models that outperform Claude Haiku 4.5 on SWE-bench Pro for coding tasks.

items.title: Xiaomi Open-Sources 1T-Param MiMo-V2.5 Model
items.summary: Xiaomi released its 1 trillion parameter MiMo-V2.5 model under MIT license, surpassing DeepSeek V4-Pro on key benchmarks.

items.title: Amazon Launches 'Join the Chat' AI Audio Q&A on Product Pages
items.summary: Amazon introduced 'Join the Chat', an AI-powered audio Q&A feature directly on product pages to enhance customer interaction.

items.title: Claude Code Faces Regression with Widespread Subagent Refusals
items.summary: Hacker News discusses a Claude Code issue where 'malware reminder on every read' triggers refusals in subagents, gaining significant attention.

items.title: Japan Airlines Deploys Humanoid Robots at Haneda Airport
items.summary: Japan Airlines started humanoid robot demonstrations at Haneda Airport to address the aviation labor shortage.

items.title: True Anomaly Raises $650M for Space Interceptors
items.summary: True Anomaly secured $650M in Series D funding at $2.2B valuation to develop space interceptors linked to Trump's Golden Dome initiative.

items.title: U.S. Army Research Lab Awards Palantir $91M AI Contract
items.summary: Palantir received a $91.2 million two-year contract from the U.S. Army Research Laboratory for AI and machine learning development.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: The Division Resurgence Launches PC Early Access
items.summary: Ubisoft's The Division Resurgence has shadow-dropped a dedicated PC client in early access today, available for download now across platforms including Steam later this summer for full launch. Maintenance is complete, and developers are hosting a stream to discuss the release.

items.title: Nvidia Announces New GPU with Increased VRAM
items.summary: Nvidia revealed a new GPU featuring more VRAM, highlighted in recent tech discussions alongside other hardware updates. This comes amid broader industry talks on gaming hardware advancements.

items.title: Xbox Project Helix Faces Memory Shortages Impacting Pricing and Availability
items.summary: Xbox confirmed that Project Helix, aimed at leading performance in console and PC gaming, is affected by memory shortages, influencing its pricing and release timeline. Valve also commented on Steam Deck 2 developments.

items.title: PlayStation Introduces 30-Day Online Check-In for Digital Games
items.summary: Sony now requires an online login every 30 days to play digital PlayStation games, alongside price increases in additional regions. This policy change has sparked discussions in gaming communities.

items.title: Marathon Sees Rapid Player Decline and Server Issues
items.summary: Bungie's Marathon is experiencing a fast drop in player numbers and crashes, with community reports indicating significant challenges shortly after launch.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Valve's Steam Controller Arrives
items.summary: Valve has released its Steam Controller, marking a significant hardware launch for the gaming platform. Reviewers are weighing in on the device's features and performance.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus Review: Reliable but Flawed
items.summary: Two months after launch, the Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus is being evaluated as a simple and reliable device, though reviewers have identified one major flaw affecting the user experience.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses Get Early Look
items.summary: Details have surfaced about Samsung's first Galaxy Glasses, with early reviews and specifications emerging ahead of an official announcement.

items.title: Motorola Razr Plus (2026) Design Leaks Before Official Launch
items.summary: The full design of Motorola's Razr Plus (2026) has leaked online shortly before its official premiere, revealing the device's appearance and features.

items.title: Apple Introduces Cheaper App Store Subscription Options
items.summary: Apple has launched commitment-based monthly subscriptions for the App Store, offering users more affordable pricing tiers for app purchases.

items.title: Ghostty Abandons GitHub Over Reliability Issues
items.summary: The Ghostty project is leaving GitHub due to chronic reliability failures, with its new hosting location still undetermined.
